testsuite.name: s2s.currency

testcase.name: purchaseApi

testcase.system-out: User enter ID in Username field User Enter Password in password field Click on submit button in login page select merchant name :- SuhasM select merchant name :- VISA Fetching details for Limit and Charges Details fetched successfully

testcase.system-out: User enter ID in Username field User Enter Password in password field Click on submit button in login page select merchant name :- SuhasM select merchant name :- VISA Fetching details for Limit and Charges Details fetched successfully
